meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Project Management to Scale AI Apps
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with basic apps. Learn expert project management techniques using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver professional AI solutions faster.
content.answer_block: Overcoming the 'basic app' plateau requires shifting from ad-hoc coding to structured project management. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you can automate boilerplate logic, enforce consistent folder structures, and focus your bandwidth on high-value features that justify premium client pricing.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: the initial excitement of a new project fades into a swamp of spaghetti code and feature creep. You’re shipping basic CRUD apps that feel like toys, while your clients demand production-grade AI engines. The cycle of 'start, struggle, stall' isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of a rigorous, repeatable engineering framework.

It’s time to stop coding like a hobbyist and start building like a principal engineer. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for high-velocity execution, you transform your workflow from reactive chaos to a proactive, scalable machine. This is the blueprint for freelancers who want to stop trading time for pennies and start building assets.

steps.title: Define the Architectural Blueprint
steps.description: Before writing code, establish a strict directory structure and tech stack definition to avoid technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a project architecture for a production-ready AI SaaS. Include a folder structure for modular backend services, API routes, and a standardized frontend. Use clean architecture principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project with the provided Antigravity architecture schema'

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Use AI to generate boilerplate code for new features, ensuring every module follows the same design patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable service layer template for an AI-integrated endpoint. Include error handling, logging, and input validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a new service module using the verified template for user-data processing'

steps.title: Implement Iterative Testing Hooks
steps.description: Embed automated testing logic into every component to maintain high code quality during rapid iteration cycles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test suite generator that writes unit tests for every new feature based on the function specifications provided.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add unit tests for all functions in the current service layer'

steps.title: Orchestrate API Integration
steps.description: Streamline third-party AI service connections with standardized middleware to prevent integration bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a middleware pattern for handling API rate limiting and cost tracking for OpenAI/Anthropic calls.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor existing AI API calls to use the new rate-limiting middleware'

steps.title: Final Review & Deployment Prep
steps.description: Perform an automated code review to identify performance leaks and security vulnerabilities before client delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a senior lead engineer. Review the codebase for architectural inconsistencies, security risks, and performance bottlenecks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'perform a comprehensive security and performance audit on the codebase'

pro_tips: Always force the AI to document its logic within the code comments; it saves hours of debugging later.
Use a 'Context.md' file in your root directory to keep track of project requirements for Claude Code to reference.
Prioritize modularity over speed; if a feature isn't easily swappable, it's not a professional build.
Treat your prompt history as a knowledge base; save successful Antigravity configurations for future projects.
Always run a final build-check command before handing over code to ensure zero dependency conflicts.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, deploy your project to a CI/CD pipeline and integrate a monitoring tool to observe production performance in real-time.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for basic apps and start building systems that scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
